reasoning: The resolution is testing whether the ON RRP balance will exceed the value associated with 2025-04-27 (expected to be the Friday, 2025-04-25 reading of 94.021, given weekend non-reporting). 94.021 is slightly below the medium-term daily average for April (which has been oscillating between ~$50B and $190B, averaging around $110B). Therefore, the near-term probability of being above this threshold is somewhat favorable (>50%). However, there is a secular long-term downward trend driven by Quantitative Tightening (QT), which means the overall balance is slowly expected to continue draining or flattening out near a structural floor. As a result, the probability of exceeding the 94.021 baseline slowly decreases over time as the average balance drops. Increased uncertainty over time—due to the potential end of QT by late 2025 or reaching a structural floor—pushes the distant horizon probabilities toward 0.50.
